basics.name: Darshak Bhatt
basics.label: Senior Product Manager · AI-driven Growth · CRO
basics.summary: Senior Product Manager with 10+ years driving AI-enabled innovation, product strategy, and cross-functional execution across B2B and B2C. At ZiniosEdge, drove $21M+ revenue impact for a US-based e-commerce client (~$100M ARR) via CRO, AI search, and subscriptions. Now building agentic AI products (Jeeva/Involve.AI, Testsigma). Two-time founder (Viazene, SuperParent). Indian Achiever's Award 2021. Relocating closer to family in the Mumbai region; on-site Mumbai / hybrid Mumbai-Navi Mumbai-Pune-Bengaluru / remote globally; 15-day notice.

work.name: Testsigma Technologies Inc
work.summary: Leading AI-first initiatives for an agentic quality-intelligence platform.
highlights: Shaping roadmap, user journeys, and workflows for autonomous test planning, execution, and insights
Launched Element Recorder and Step Recorder for Windows desktop apps (no-code element capture & step authoring)
Cleared a 110+ bug Jira backlog for US enterprise clients with SLA-driven prioritization and an executive dashboard

work.name: Jeeva · Involve.AI
highlights: Launched Outbound AI within the SLG workspace — 60% adoption in one month
Built an agentic ICP engine — 100,000-lead list in two months, +25% lead-to-opportunity conversion
Drove ARPU growth via PLG onboarding & pricing optimization — $450,000 in booked revenue
Orchestrated a Data Integrity & Idempotency framework (Source Priority Matrix)

work.name: ZiniosEdge Software Technologies

Owned KPI/OKR; cut tracking delta 30%, improving hypothesis-driven experimentation 40%

Awarded the 2021 Indian Achiever's Award (Govt. of India Startup Initiative)

+24% community activation; +15% adoption

projects.name: Intraday ORB Trading Agent
projects.description: Algorithmic Opening Range Breakout intraday trading agent. n8n triggered on a Sheet cell, fetches Upstox v3 candles, scores breakouts against ADX + RSI + Bollinger squeeze + volume filters before placing orders.
highlights: n8n + Upstox v3 + technicalindicators (npm)
Lovable frontend
Strategy explainer + JSON download on GitHub Pages

projects.name: Peer & Competitor Monitor
projects.description: Two n8n workflows that watch competitor/peer URLs on a schedule. v1 GPT-4 scored 1-10 with critical alerts to Discord + Gmail; v2 MD5 hash-based diff for cheap deterministic monitoring.
highlights: n8n + Google Sheets + Gmail + Discord webhooks
GPT-4 impact scoring (v1) and MD5 hashing (v2)
Microsite with architecture diagram + sanitized JSON downloads

projects.name: Prospect Research Agent
projects.description: Two-agent n8n + LangChain chain. Prospect name → 10-section psychological sales profile in ~60s. Research Agent (GPT-4o + Perplexity Sonar Pro + LinkedIn) feeds Psychological Profiler (chatgpt-4o-latest), emailed via Gmail.
highlights: LangChain agents inside n8n
Three research tools: Perplexity, Google, LinkedIn
Includes ethics-use guidance

projects.name: jira-digest
projects.description: Daily Jira digest delivered to email, Slack, or Teams. One YAML, any company. AI-onboarded setup via Claude Code / Codex / Cursor.
highlights: Open source
GitHub Pages landing
Python 3.11 + GitHub Actions
